AssociateVolume.description: Grants permission to associate a workspace managed volume to a workspace managed instance in your account

CreateVolume.description: Grants permission to create a workspace managed volume in your account

CreateWorkspaceInstance.description: Grants permission to create a workspace managed instance in your account

DeleteVolume.description: Grants permission to delete a workspace managed volume in your account

DeleteWorkspaceInstance.description: Grants permission to delete a workspace managed instance in your account

DisassociateVolume.description: Grants permission to disassociate a workspace managed volume from a workspace managed instance in your account

GetWorkspaceInstance.description: Grants permission to get details for a specific workspace managed instance in your account

ListInstanceTypes.description: Grants permission to list all supported instance types

ListRegions.description: Grants permission to list all supported AWS regions

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list user tags for resources in your account

ListWorkspaceInstances.description: Grants permission to list workspace managed instances in your account

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add user tags to resources in your account

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove user tags from resources in your account

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access based on the tag keys that are passed in the request
